title: Developer Profile
description: Schema for sap-devs profile YAML files

id.description: Unique profile slug, e.g. cap-developer. Reserved: all, minimal

packs.description: Ordered list of pack IDs and their weights for this profile

weight.description: Sort priority within this profile; higher = earlier

tip_tags.description: Preferred tip tags for this profile (used by sap-devs tip)
